creator: doconnor@ist.flinders.edu.au
text:
I have tried to run the DHCPD under version 2.2, but it doesn't seem to
work, I have used exactly the same configuration etc.. as under 2.1.0,
and 2.1.6. The problem seems to be that the server doesn't actually get
any of the messages(ie it never gets told about them). I am not sure
whether this is a kernel bug or not.

How-To-Repeat: Compile DHCPD-5.14Beta under FreeBSD-2.2 and try and get it to answer
requests.
